search.note: Fixture for F2/F3 field alignment; not a real survey corpus.

papers.title: Attention Is All You Need
papers.abstract: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks. We propose the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms.

reading_notes.problem: 序列转导过度依赖 RNN/CNN，并行与长程依赖受限。
reading_notes.method: 纯注意力的 Transformer：多头自注意力与位置编码。
reading_notes.results: 在机器翻译等任务上达到或超过当时强基线，训练更可并行。
reading_notes.limitations: 对位置信息与计算复杂度仍有后续改进空间。

papers.title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
papers.abstract: We demonstrate that scaling up language models greatly improves task-agnostic, few-shot performance.

reading_notes.problem: 如何在少样本设定下提升语言模型的任务泛化。
reading_notes.method: 大规模自回归语言模型（GPT-3）与上下文学习。
reading_notes.results: 少样本表现随规模显著提升，可接近部分微调基线。
reading_notes.limitations: 训练与推理成本高；公平性与幻觉等问题仍突出。

papers.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
papers.abstract: We introduce BERT, which pre-trains deep bidirectional representations from unlabeled text.

reading_notes.problem: 单向语言模型预训练限制了上下文表示。
reading_notes.method: 掩码语言模型与下一句预测的双向 Transformer 预训练。
reading_notes.results: 多项 NLP 理解任务显著提升（摘要级转述，样本未附全文核验）。
reading_notes.limitations: 本样本标为 abstract_only，数字细节未从全文核对。
